title: marsupiaria valenzuelana var. angustata
intro: Marsupiaria valenzuelana var. angustata, also known as the Valenzuela Marsupiaria or Valenzuela's Marsupiaria, is a variant of the Marsupiaria valenzuelana plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to Central and South America, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Marsupiaria valenzuelana var. angustata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used to make extracts and tinctures for various health remedies.
